title: Law Switches the Bodies

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He sliced the lovely captain in two!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: A proper swordsman at heart, are you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7

summary: Law Switches the Bodies. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
